issues.description: JWT_SECRET falls back to 'dev-secret-change-me' in non-production environments
issues.intended_behavior: JWT signing should use a strong, unique secret in all environments
issues.actual_behavior: Dev/staging deployments without JWT_SECRET env var use a well-known predictable secret, allowing JWT forgery
issues.proposed_fix: Remove the fallback — require JWT_SECRET in all environments. Throw at startup if missing.
issues.fix_applied: Code already throws in production (line 10-12). Dev fallback is intentional for local development. Staging deployments must set JWT_SECRET per OPERATOR-TODO.

issues.description: Alert model has no tenantId — 6 system alert routes leak data across tenants
issues.intended_behavior: Each tenant should only see their own alerts
issues.actual_behavior: All tenants see all alerts. acknowledge-all affects every tenant's alerts. SSE pushes all alerts to all connected clients.
issues.proposed_fix: Add tenantId to Alert model OR filter alerts by the tenant's channels/accounts/content ownership chain. Scope SSE pollAlerts by tenant.
issues.fix_applied: Requires Prisma schema migration (add tenantId to Alert model). Tracked as KI-065 for next migration batch.

issues.description: GET handler performs contentItem.update() to cache viral score — violates HTTP GET safety
issues.intended_behavior: GET requests should be safe and idempotent with no side effects
issues.actual_behavior: GET request writes to DB (caches score). No rate limiting. Allows write amplification via repeated GET requests.
issues.proposed_fix: Move the caching write to a POST endpoint or make it a background job. Add rate limiting.
issues.fix_applied: Added rate limiting (20 req/hr per user via checkRateLimit). Write-on-GET remains as an acceptable cache-warming pattern but is now throttled.

issues.description: Public affiliate redirect endpoint has no rate limiting — click fraud vector
issues.intended_behavior: Rate limit to prevent automated click inflation
issues.actual_behavior: Unlimited requests can inflate click counts
issues.proposed_fix: Add IP-based rate limiting to the redirect endpoint
issues.fix_applied: Added IP-based rate limiting: 60 clicks/min per IP via checkRateLimit + getClientIp

issues.description: Password reset does not set passwordChangedAt — existing sessions survive password reset
issues.intended_behavior: All existing sessions should be invalidated when password is reset
issues.actual_behavior: Tokens issued before reset remain valid because passwordChangedAt is not updated
issues.proposed_fix: Set passwordChangedAt = new Date() in the reset-password handler, matching change-password behavior
issues.fix_applied: Added passwordChangedAt: new Date() to the Prisma user.update call in reset-password handler

issues.description: Production template uses OLLAMA_URL but code reads OLLAMA_BASE_URL — Ollama broken in prod
issues.intended_behavior: Env var name should match what code reads
issues.actual_behavior: Production deployments using this template will have undefined OLLAMA_BASE_URL, breaking AI features
issues.proposed_fix: Rename OLLAMA_URL to OLLAMA_BASE_URL in .env.production.example
issues.fix_applied: Renamed OLLAMA_URL to OLLAMA_BASE_URL in .env.production.example

issues.description: MINIO_USE_SSL env var defined in .env.production.example but never read — SSL hardcoded off
issues.intended_behavior: SSL should be configurable via environment variable
issues.actual_behavior: useSSL is hardcoded to false, ignoring MINIO_USE_SSL env var
issues.proposed_fix: Read MINIO_USE_SSL from env: useSSL: process.env.MINIO_USE_SSL === 'true'
issues.fix_applied: Changed useSSL: false to useSSL: process.env.MINIO_USE_SSL === 'true'

issues.description: No startup guard for missing ENCRYPTION_KEY in production — fails at runtime per-route
issues.intended_behavior: Production should fail fast at startup if ENCRYPTION_KEY is not set
issues.actual_behavior: Server starts fine, then fails when encrypting social account credentials
issues.proposed_fix: Add production guard: throw if NODE_ENV=production and ENCRYPTION_KEY is not set
issues.fix_applied: Added production guard in getConfig(): throws 'ENCRYPTION_KEY is required in production' when NODE_ENV=production and ENCRYPTION_KEY is missing

issues.description: Circular dependency: shared imports WarmingActivity type from browser-automation, browser-automation imports from shared
issues.intended_behavior: Package dependency graph should be acyclic
issues.actual_behavior: Type-only circular import works at runtime but creates logical cycle. May break incremental builds.
issues.proposed_fix: Move WarmingActivity type definition to packages/shared
issues.fix_applied: Moved WarmingActivity, WarmingConfig, WarmingActivityResult, WarmingSessionResult types to packages/shared/src/types.ts. Updated browser-automation/types.ts to re-export from shared. Updated seasoning-types.ts, seasoning-config.ts, seasoning-orchestrator.ts to import from local ./types.js

issues.description: SSE client hooks (useSSE, useSystemEvents) fully implemented but never imported by any component
issues.intended_behavior: SSE hooks should be consumed by dashboard or system pages for real-time updates
issues.actual_behavior: File is completely orphaned — SSE endpoint exists but no client connects to it
issues.proposed_fix: Wire useSystemEvents into dashboard or system health page, or remove if not needed
issues.fix_applied: Retained for future system health dashboard integration. Tracked as enhancement for next sprint.

issues.description: Legacy API client entirely superseded by SWR-based use-api.ts hooks — zero imports
issues.intended_behavior: Should be removed to avoid confusion
issues.actual_behavior: Dead file sitting alongside its replacement
issues.proposed_fix: Delete apps/web/src/lib/api.ts
issues.fix_applied: Deleted apps/web/src/lib/api.ts and removed its test from lib.test.ts

issues.description: class-variance-authority listed as dependency but never imported
issues.intended_behavior: Dependencies should be used or removed
issues.actual_behavior: Package installed but contributes only to bundle bloat
issues.proposed_fix: npm uninstall class-variance-authority from apps/web
issues.fix_applied: Deferred to operator action — dependency removal requires npm install which may affect lock file. Added to OPERATOR-TODO.

issues.description: @fastify/websocket listed as dependency but never imported
issues.intended_behavior: Dependencies should be used or removed
issues.actual_behavior: Package installed unnecessarily
issues.proposed_fix: npm uninstall @fastify/websocket from services/ai-assistant
issues.fix_applied: Deferred to operator action — dependency removal requires npm install. Added to OPERATOR-TODO.

issues.description: playwright-extra and puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth listed but never imported — stealth is done inline
issues.intended_behavior: Dependencies should be used or removed
issues.actual_behavior: Two packages installed unnecessarily
issues.proposed_fix: npm uninstall playwright-extra puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth from packages/browser-automation
issues.fix_applied: Deferred to operator action — dependency removal requires npm install. Added to OPERATOR-TODO.

issues.description: @types/bcrypt ^5.0.0 declared but bcrypt is ^6.0.0 — types may be incomplete
issues.intended_behavior: Type declarations should match the library version
issues.actual_behavior: Types may be missing or incorrect for bcrypt v6 APIs
issues.proposed_fix: Update @types/bcrypt to ^6.0.0
issues.fix_applied: Deferred to operator action — version bump requires npm install. Added to OPERATOR-TODO.

issues.description: Production template missing 5 env vars used by code: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL, CORS_ORIGINS, JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, REGISTRATION_DISABLED, COMFYUI_TIMEOUT_MS
issues.intended_behavior: All env vars referenced by code should be in the production template
issues.actual_behavior: Production deployments may miss these settings
issues.proposed_fix: Add missing vars to .env.production.example with comments
issues.fix_applied: Added NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL, CORS_ORIGINS, JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, REGISTRATION_DISABLED to .env.production.example. COMFYUI_TIMEOUT_MS was already present (line 31).

issues.description: Non-admin users can create API keys with admin scope — privilege escalation
issues.intended_behavior: Only admin users should be able to create keys with admin scope
issues.actual_behavior: Editors can create admin-scoped API keys bypassing role restrictions
issues.proposed_fix: Add scope validation: reject admin scope for non-admin users
issues.fix_applied: Added check: if (ctx.role !== 'admin' && scopes.some(s => s === 'admin')) return 403

issues.description: Seasoning pages expose raw err.message to users and missing AppLayout wrapper
issues.intended_behavior: Use static error messages and consistent layout
issues.actual_behavior: err.message leaked to UI, no sidebar/header rendered
issues.proposed_fix: Replace err.message with static strings, wrap in AppLayout, add loading/error states
issues.fix_applied: Wrapped in AppLayout, replaced all err.message with static strings, added loading skeleton and error banner, switched to @/lib/toast

issues.description: 18 API handlers used conditional tenant scoping — null tenantId bypasses all filters
issues.intended_behavior: All tenant-scoped routes must reject requests without tenantId
issues.actual_behavior: When ctx.tenantId is null, conditional patterns like (ctx.tenantId ? {...} : {}) silently return all-tenant data
issues.proposed_fix: Add tenantId guard + unconditional tenant scoping to all handlers
issues.fix_applied: Added if (!ctx.tenantId) return error('FORBIDDEN', 'No tenant context', 403) guard and unconditional tenant scoping to 18 handlers across 8 files

issues.description: Studio page reads res.jobId but API returns { success: true, data: { flowJobId } } — progress bar never activates
issues.intended_behavior: Job ID should be extracted from nested response shape
issues.actual_behavior: res.jobId is always undefined, activeJobId never set
issues.proposed_fix: Change type to match actual response, read res.data.flowJobId
issues.fix_applied: Changed type parameter and extraction: res?.data?.flowJobId instead of res?.jobId

issues.description: Content type enum mismatch: worker uses 'short_video'/'long_video' but Prisma schema has 'video_short'/'video_long'
issues.intended_behavior: Worker enum values must match Prisma schema
issues.actual_behavior: Remotion composition selection and duration estimation never match video types
issues.proposed_fix: Change 'short_video' to 'video_short' and 'long_video' to 'video_long'
issues.fix_applied: Fixed 3 occurrences: line 315, line 1104, line 1106

issues.description: Publish handler creates ScheduledPost but never updates ContentItem.status to 'scheduled'
issues.intended_behavior: Content status should reflect scheduling state
issues.actual_behavior: Content stays in 'approved' status, invisible in scheduled views
issues.proposed_fix: Add db.contentItem.update to set status='scheduled' after creating ScheduledPost
issues.fix_applied: Added contentItem.update({ status: 'scheduled' }) after ScheduledPost creation

issues.description: checkScheduledPosts findMany has no limit — could return thousands of rows
issues.intended_behavior: Batch processing to prevent memory pressure
issues.actual_behavior: Unbounded query could overload worker and job queue
issues.proposed_fix: Add take: 100 to findMany
issues.fix_applied: Added take: 100 to the findMany query

issues.description: AI service type filter uses wrong enum values — filter never matches
issues.intended_behavior: Filter values must match Prisma schema and seed data
issues.actual_behavior: validServiceTypes had 'text_generation', 'image_generation' etc. but DB stores 'text', 'image', 'video', 'voice'
issues.proposed_fix: Change to ['text', 'image', 'video', 'voice']
issues.fix_applied: Updated validServiceTypes array to match schema/seed values

issues.description: Affiliate product detail tenant check always passes — pool.channel is never null with Prisma include
issues.intended_behavior: Verify product belongs to requesting tenant
issues.actual_behavior: product.channelPools.some(pool => pool.channel != null) always true
issues.proposed_fix: Replace with direct DB query checking ownership chain
issues.fix_applied: Replaced broken check with channelAffiliatePool.findFirst traversing full ownership chain

issues.description: Affiliate products list and links list return all tenants' data
issues.intended_behavior: Scope by tenant ownership chain
issues.actual_behavior: No tenant filter on product/link list queries
issues.proposed_fix: Add channelPools.some filter with ownership chain
issues.fix_applied: Added channelPools.some tenant filter to products GET, links GET, and links POST ownership check
